response.original_title: Can I cancel a transaction on Robinhood? Premium Support
response.overview: Yes , you can cancel a transaction on Robinhood, but only if it’s still pending .1 ⟶ 888 ⟶ 576 ⟶ 2041  Go to the order details and tap “Cancel”1 ⟶ 888 ⟶ 576 ⟶ 2041  before it gets executed. Once a trade is completed 1 ⤷ 888 ⤷ 576 ⤷ 2041 , it cannot be reversed . Always review your order carefully  before confirming.
